name: Aave SDK
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); protocol fees on flash loans (0.05%); no SDK costs

auth.notes: No API key required; direct smart contract interaction via RPC

performance.notes: On-chain transaction latency depends on EVM network; flash loans atomic in single transaction

agent_readiness.notes: Official TypeScript SDK for Aave Protocol v3 — the leading DeFi lending protocol. Supply, borrow, repay, withdraw operations. Flash loans (atomic uncollateralized loans). Health factor calculation. Interest rate data. Available on Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, Optimism, Arbitrum, Base. Used by DeFi agents for automated lending strategies and flash loan arbitrage.

gotchas: Smart contract risk — protocol bugs can cause total loss
Gas costs can make small positions uneconomical
Flash loans require repayment in same transaction — complex execution
best_when: Yield aggregators using Aave as lending layer
Building DeFi agents that interact with lending markets
avoid_when: Production use without extensive security testing
summary: Aave SDK provides TypeScript utilities for interacting with Aave Protocol v3 — the leading DeFi lending protocol. Supply, borrow, repay, and flash loan operations across Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, and more. Used by DeFi agents for automated lending strategies and flash loan arbitrage. Requires deep DeFi knowledge and careful security review before production use.
